features.featureTitle: Update the admin credentials stored in the Motoko backend so that the admin username/phone is set to 'ADMIN' and the password is set to 'Mahendra7959'. This must be applied via the stable actor variable or one-time initialization mechanism already in place — not hardcoded in frontend source code. The admin login flow on the frontend (Login page) must continue to authenticate against the backend actor using these new credentials.
